summary.intent: Implement story 2.1 (nano stores and number formatting utilities) for the metrics project, following the BMAD dev workflow.
summary.outcome: All 4 nano stores and 6 formatter functions were implemented with 29 passing tests; story status advanced from ready-for-dev to review.

repo: Project uses BMAD workflow with story files in _bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/ and sprint tracking via sprint-status.yaml
Stores live in src/lib/stores/, utilities in src/lib/utils/ — both directories pre-existed with .gitkeep files
Story files require manual updates to task completion, file list, dev record, change log, and status fields

code.finding: Node.js Intl.NumberFormat with style:'currency' returns '$NaN' for NaN inputs, not bare 'NaN' — test expectations must account for this
Nano stores require explicit generics and typed initial values: null for price/market, 'connecting' for status, [] for chart data

workflow: BMAD workflow requires updating sprint-status.yaml to in-progress before implementation and to review after completion
Story tasks and implementation can be parallelized — stores (tasks 1-4) and format-utils (tasks 5-10) were written simultaneously
Code review should ideally be run with a different LLM than the one that implemented the story

friction: NaN test expectation mismatch required a test run, diagnosis, and fix before all tests passed
open_items: Code review for story 2.1 pending — should be run via /bmad-code-review with a different LLM
Next story 2-2-websocket-connection-manager-binance is queued but not started
